title: Spanish Paella Delight
description: A classic Spanish dish made with seafood, rice, and spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the mussels and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the squid ink and cook for an additional minute.
Add the rice, paella spice mix, and water to the pan, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the olives and continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
